blurb: Season 4 arena gear for Marksmanship Hunter: the Brutal Gladiator's set (Brutal Gladiator's Chain Helm, Brutal Gladiator's Chain Spaulders, Brutal Gladiator's Chain Gauntlets…), backed by Guardian's offset pieces from the honor vendor. Season 4 has the strictest gates in TBC: the Brutal weapon requires 1950 rating, shoulders 2200, and several pieces check personal rating as well as team rating. The slot-by-slot list below translates what the current arena ladder's top Marksmanship Hunters equip into their Season 4 equivalents — same slot logic, this season's items.

alternatives.name: Merciless Gladiator's Crossbow of the Phoenix
alternatives.pveFlexNote: No Season 4 equivalent — current-season item shown.

faq.question: What is the Season 4 arena set for Marksmanship Hunter?
faq.answer: The Brutal Gladiator's pieces: Brutal Gladiator's Chain Helm, Brutal Gladiator's Chain Spaulders, Brutal Gladiator's Chain Gauntlets, Brutal Gladiator's Chain Leggings, Brutal Gladiator's Cleaver, Brutal Gladiator's Quickblade. The 2-piece and 4-piece set bonuses carry over between seasons, so partial upgrades never break your bonus.

faq.question: What are the rating requirements in Season 4?
faq.answer: Season 4 has the strictest gates in TBC: the Brutal weapon requires 1950 rating, shoulders 2200, and several pieces check personal rating as well as team rating.

faq.question: How many arena points does full Season 4 gear cost?
faq.answer: The five set pieces total roughly 8,250 arena points (helm/chest/legs 1,875 each, shoulders 1,500, gloves 1,125) plus about 3,750 for a main weapon. Use the arena points calculator to turn your weekly rating into a purchase timeline.

faq.question: Which honor pieces complement the Season 4 set?
faq.answer: Guardian's Chain Bracers, Guardian's Chain Girdle, Guardian's Chain Sabatons, Guardian's Band of Triumph — bought with honor and battleground marks, no arena rating needed.
